missing_dependencies_report.impact: Required to compile custom plugins and bind backend kernels
Crucial for compiling any element under cpp/ and plugins/
Used inside custom GEMM operators under plugins/
Required for weight checkpoint conversion utilities

active_runtime_drift.safeguards: No internal modules from external/ are imported or evaluated during active execution of src/*. Active code remains thin and fully portable.

build_isolation_drift.safeguards: Dockerfile ignores external/ folders from intermediate build steps, retaining small footprint configurations and offline build reproducibility.

dependency_drift.safeguards: System requirements.txt remains the immutable list of truth, preventing unexpected library downloads or dependency failures during Cloud Run pipeline updates.

proposed_future_ingestion_sequence.objective: Adopt advanced vocabulary optimization logic into active parsing libraries safely
Elevate local FastAPI endpoints and queue architectures to utilize production templates
Update current memory controllers with systematic diagnostic memory check logic
Integrate Cloud Run orchestration scripts to dynamically look up prebuilt engine shapes
